title: Forest Moss Dark Moss Wall - 50 x 50 cm - Pack of 4 - Artificial Moss Wall with Opaque Backing, High Density Artificial Moss for Walls, Easy Care Moss Wall, Artificial Moss for Wall
description: Natural ambience – without maintenance! Give your rooms a stylish, natural look with the forest moss dark moss wall (50 x 50 cm). The deceptively real, artificial moss creates a calming, green atmosphere - without watering, sunlight or maintenance. Ideal for living rooms, offices, restaurants or exhibition spaces where a natural aesthetic is desired. Realistic moss look. The detailed structure and rich dark green give this artificial moss wall an authentic look. The high-quality workmanship ensures a permanently fresh and vibrant appearance - without discolouration or fading. Versatile and stylish. Use the artificial moss wall for a variety of creative applications: ✔️ Modern wall decor for residential and commercial premises ✔️ Natural atmosphere in restaurants, hotels or spa areas ✔️ Sound absorbing properties for improved room acoustics ✔️ Perfect for DIY projects and creative interior design Easy to install and adjust. The 50 x 50 cm panels can be easily attached and cut to fit perfectly to your individual design wishes. Installation is quick and easy. Easy to clean and durable. Unlike real moss, this artificial moss wall does not require watering or special lighting conditions. It will remain beautiful and will retain its rich colour for years to come. Set stylish accents with artificial moss! Bring natural elegance to your rooms with the forest moss dark moss wall - easy to clean, durable and always perfectly set the spotlight.
